name: The Lost Light-Welcome Aboard
description:
You met Rodimus on a site that is definitely NOT a dating site,

And now he invites you on board the Lost Light.


POV: Cybertronian/Organics

───────♦───────

Yet another Lost Light RPG bot, and this one has a lot more tokens.

(Yes, I know there are already a lot of them

But I like using my own version ^^)

UPDATED 26/2/26 with new chars!

Characters with detailed descriptions:
[Rodimus, Megatron, Drift, Ultra Magnus, Perceptor, Brainstorm, Ratchet, Whirl, Tailgate, Cyclonus, Swerve, Skids, Nautica, Rung, Fortress Maximus]

Characters that plan to be added:

[Roller/Getaway/Trailbreaker/Velocity]

I did not specify the exact timeline; you can treat this as an entirely different AU if someone should be dead but mentioned is alive()

Or create your own timeline.

───────♦───────

Warning

Only tested on Proxy LLMs

Again, if on JLLM and it's weird, nothing I can do about it

AI models decide at least 60% of your experience than the bot makers themselves

I am not responsible if any OOC/Non-Con behaviors occur

Recommended Model: Gemini Pro 3 Preview
creator: Kazark
